form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 5th (Fr8) over 1609m at Pocono Downs beaten 13 m by Federer (1:50.30) in NW17500L5 on March 28 at $40.70. The run previous 5th (Fr6) over 1609m at Saratoga, beaten 6 m by Frisco Bay (1:54.40) in WO/OPENHCP on February 21 at $2.29. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when a close third after showing early speed, behind Tims A Trooper at Albion Park over 1660m in a No NR on December 27 at $2.30. Previous preparation first-up won by 8 m (Fr7) at Albion Park (1:56.70) beating Studleigh Punter in NR up to 70 on June 6 at $11. Strong prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out under pressure in the home straight in the un to the finish.
Inclined to over race during the mid stages when racing outside of the leader
